street.description: Street on which the removed parking space was located

side.description: Side of the street the space was on; empty when the source does not state one

within_feet.description: Distance in feet of the prohibition zone around the reference point, from 'within N feet of ...'; empty when the source gives no distance

reference_point.description: Physical feature the distance is measured from, lowercase without leading article (e.g. 'marked crosswalk'); empty when none stated

near_address.description: Street address anchoring the reference point, exactly as written (e.g. '26 Lincoln Street', '39A Lincoln Street'); the geocodable anchor for the row

meter_number.description: Former parking meter number, digits only with the '#' stripped; empty when the space was not described as metered

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source that does not fit the structured columns; empty for all current entries

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
